title: Neottia microglottis
taxonomy: Neottia microglottis, also known as the small-flowered grass pink, is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Neottia is a part of the subfamily Neottioideae, which is a subfamily of orchids. Neottia microglottis is native to North America and is often found growing in woodland environments. It is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than on other plants.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have information on the medicinal uses of Neottia microglottis.
